items.title: MARCUS CHEN STACKED 30 MAC MINIS INTO AN AI SERVER FARM. ONE $599 MAC MINI REPLACES YOUR $200/MONTH CLAUDE CODE BILL WIT
items.summary:
MARCUS CHEN STACKED 30 MAC MINIS INTO AN AI SERVER FARM. ONE $599 MAC MINI REPLACES YOUR $200/MONTH CLAUDE CODE BILL WITH $3 IN ELECTRICITY

two months ago a developer posted his claude code bill on reddit. $170 in 10 days. someone replied "i bought a mac mini m4. haven't paid anthropic since." apple stores ran out of mac minis the same week

the m4 chip has 120 gb/s memory bandwidth and unified memory architecture. cpu and gpu share one pool so the model loads once and both read from it. a $599 mac mini runs ai faster than a $1,500 windows pc with a discrete gpu

since january 2026 ollama supports the anthropic messages api format. claude code connects directly to your local mac mini with one environment variable. same interface, zero api costs, $0 per request

a heavy developer pays $459 a month across claude code max, chatgpt pro, gemini, cursor and copilot. that's $5,508 a year. the mac mini pays off in 3 months and runs on $3 in electricity after that

uber rolled out claude code to 5,000 engineers and burned through their $3.4 billion 2026 ai budget in 4 months. the people who own the hardware in 2026 are going to look very far ahead in 2028

items.title: A 36-year-old girl from Detroit who has 3 kids asked Claude how to make money if you don't have time to do anything?
items.summary:
A 36-year-old girl from Detroit who has 3 kids asked Claude how to make money if you don't have time to do anything?
He gave an answer and her monthly income amounted to $15,459

Claude + Shopify = automated dropshipping

All her investment is a $20 Claude subscription

Claude comes up with a niche for products by analyzing popular trends, creates clickable descriptions, generates photos and videos that stand out from the rest

A person pays for the order -> Claude buys on Aliexpress 60-70% cheaper -> the package goes to the buyer

In essence, this is a store managed by a manager instead of you, you just get the profit

Earnings:

Week 1 > $1,465
Week 2 > $2,657
Week 3 > $7,842
1 month > $15,459

The full instruction is already publicly available

items.title: Tesla is recovering in Europe. BYD is still beating it. - Sherwood News
items.summary: Tesla’s recovery across Europe continued last month, but it still lags BYD, according to new data from the European Automobile Manufacturers’ Association. In April, BYD registered more than twice as many cars as Tesla in the EU, UK, and the European Free Trade Association. Tesla thinks upcoming approval of its supervised Full Self-Driving tech is integral to its success on the continent. Tesla recently received approval for a version of its supervised FSD in the Netherlands, its first European market, and expects “EU-wide” approval in the second or third quarter of this year. The companies’ soaring valuations and annualized recurring revenue (ARR) have been running neck and neck for months, and The Information now reports that Anthropic is generating an estimated 35% more revenue than OpenAI. According to The Information’s reporting, Anthropic is close to a staggering $45 billion ARR, while OpenAI is at an estimated $33 billion ARR.

items.title: Tesla Stock Is In A Three-Weeks-Tight, Continues Its Recovery From A Deep Slump - Investor's Business Daily
items.summary: # Tesla Stock Is In A Three-Weeks-Tight, Continues Its Recovery From A Deep Slump. **Tesla** (TSLA) stock started the week in a three-weeks-tight pattern, formed in the handle of a cup-with-handle base. ## Tesla Stock Is Three-Weeks-Tight. Tesla's three-weeks-tight pattern comes after the stock got above the 200-day line earlier this month, according to MarketSurge. This occurs as the stock recovers from an extended slump begun in December. At one point, Tesla stock had finished down eight weeks in a row. Tesla stock is working toward a buy point of 453.40, which is the high point of its current handle, as well as the three-weeks-tight pattern. Investors looking for an early entry could have used the stock's move above the 10-day line on Tuesday. ## Tesla Stock. As a company, Tesla is in the midst of reinventing itself from an automaker to an AI and robotics firm. items.title: Tesla Logs Strong Growth in European Monthly Sales - WSJ
items.summary: # Tesla European Sales Rose 46.5% as BYD Registrations Doubled - WSJ. https://www.wsj.com/business/autos/tesla-logs-strong-growth-in-european-monthly-sales-5fbe07a2. # Tesla Logs Strong Growth in European Monthly Sales. Image 1: People walking past a Tesla Inc. showroom in Stockholm, Sweden. New-car registrations for Tesla models jumped 46.5% on year last month to 10,654 units across the EU, U.K., Iceland, Liechtenstein, Norway and Switzerland.Erik Flyg/Bloomberg News. Tesla’sTSLA 1.78%increase; green up pointing triangle sales in Europe grew strongly in April, a sign that Elon Musk’s electric-vehicle maker continues to regain momentum in the region after a slump that stretched more than a year. New-car registrations for Tesla models, a reflection of sales, jumped 46.5% on year last month to 10,654 units across the European Union, the U.K., Iceland, Liechtenstein, Norway and Switzerland, according to the European Automobile Manufacturers’ Association, an industry body also known as ACEA. Image 3: Can This Guy Get People to Live in America’s Emptiest Downtown? #### Can This Guy Get People to Live in America’s Emptiest Downtown?

items.title: Tesla Self-Certified Its Model Y Robotaxis for Level 4 Autonomy Under a New Texas Law - autoevolution
items.summary: # Tesla Self-Certified Its Model Y Robotaxis for Level 4 Autonomy Under a New Texas Law. Tesla benefited from a new Texas law that allows companies to self-certify their robotaxis to provide commercial driverless rides across the state. Tesla can now offer paid robotaxi rides across Texas, thanks to a new law that allows companies to self-certify their autonomous driving systems. The Level 4 certification allows Tesla to provide paid rides in Texas with no drivers or operators in the vehicle. This might be unrelated, but the same day Texas authorized Tesla for driverless Robotaxi operations, Elon Musk shared the video of a Cybercab driving off the production line at Giga Texas without a steering wheel. More significantly, Musk's post was retweeted by Tesla AI chief Ashok Elluswamy, who said that autonomous Cybercabs will soon be driving themselves *"to Austin city, reporting for duty."* This suggests that Tesla will soon start offering driverless rides in the Cybercab, in addition to Model Y robotaxis, across Texas. Tesla robotaxi Tesla autonomous driving Texas tesla cybercab.

items.title: Tesla Cybercab Self-Driving: Elon Musk Shares Video of Robotaxi Autonomously Driving Out of Giga Texas - LatestLY
items.summary: # Tesla Cybercab Self-Driving: Elon Musk Shares Video of Robotaxi Autonomously Driving Out of Giga Texas Factory. ## Elon Musk shared a video showing the Tesla Cybercab driving autonomously out of the Tesla Giga Texas factory on May 28, 2026. The footage highlights Tesla’s progress in self-driving technology and automated manufacturing, while generating excitement ahead of the Cybercab’s planned commercial robotaxi deployment. Elon Musk has shared a new video showing a Tesla Cybercab autonomously driving itself out of the Giga Texas factory on May 28, 2026. The footage demonstrates the robotaxi’s advanced self-driving capabilities as it navigates the factory environment without human intervention. #### **Tesla Cybercab Autonomous Driving Shared by Elon Musk**. > — Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 28, 2026. *(The above story first appeared on LatestLY on May 29, 2026 07:30 AM IST. Cybercab Autonomous Driving   Driverless Car Tesla   Elon Musk Robotaxi   Future of Transportation   Tesla AI Driving   Tesla Autonomous Taxi.
